title: Snoring respiratory review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed respiratory polygraphy, home oximetry where appropriate, polysomnography in the specified context, and use of sleep-study results by clinicians to diagnose and grade OSAHS.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-selected OSAHS diagnostic testing for snoring and sleep-disordered breathing review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed respiratory polygraphy, home oximetry where appropriate, polysomnography in the specified context, and use of sleep-study results by clinicians to diagnose and grade OSAHS.

source.title: Obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome and obesity hypoventilation syndrome in over 16s

referral.text: Supports snoring, witnessed apnoeas, unrefreshing or fragmented sleep, waking headache, sleepiness or fatigue, nocturia, choking, cognitive symptoms, obesity context, Epworth Sleepiness Scale, and STOP-Bang, while prohibiting use of Epworth alone to determine referral.
referral.rationale: Supports adult OSAHS symptom and risk assessment for snoring and sleep-disordered breathing review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports snoring, witnessed apnoeas, unrefreshing or fragmented sleep, waking headache, sleepiness or fatigue, nocturia, choking, cognitive symptoms, obesity context, Epworth Sleepiness Scale, and STOP-Bang, while prohibiting use of Epworth alone to determine referral.

source.title: Obstructive sleep apnoea/hypopnoea syndrome and obesity hypoventilation syndrome in over 16s

referral.text: Supports referral information on assessment scores, functional sleepiness, comorbidities, occupational or driving risk, and oxygen saturation or blood gases if available.
referral.rationale: Supports prioritising qualified sleep-service assessment for snoring and sleep-disordered breathing review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports referral information on assessment scores, functional sleepiness, comorbidities, occupational or driving risk, and oxygen saturation or blood gases if available.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Snoring pattern, witnessed apnoea, choking, sleepiness, driving, sleep schedule, weight, comorbidity, examination, tests, diagnosis and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for snoring and sleep-disordered breathing review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
